## Router Assembly

The `init_routers` function calls all focused router initializers and
wires up cross-router dependencies.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### init_routers

``` python

def init_routers(
    workflow:StructureDecompWorkflow, # The workflow instance
)->List: # List of configured routers

```

*Initialize and return all workflow routers.*
